PatientRecord.title: Patient Record
PatientRecord.description: A medical certificate record for a nephrology patient.

nagritaNumber.description: The citizenship number of the patient.

patientPhone.description: The phone number of the patient.

wardNo.description: The ward number of the patient.

dialysisStartDateBS.description: The start date of dialysis in BS.

dialysisStartDateAD.description: The start date of dialysis in AD.

issueDateBS.description: The date the certificate was issued in BS.

issueDateAD.description: The date the certificate was issued in AD.

doctorId.description: The ID of the doctor who issued the certificate.

doctorNmc.description: The NMC number of the doctor.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who created the record.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

Doctor.title: Doctor
Doctor.description: A doctor who can sign certificates.

nmcNumber.description: The NMC number of the doctor.

HospitalSettings.title: Hospital Settings
HospitalSettings.description: Configuration for the hospital header and logo.

logoUrl.description: The base64 encoded logo or URL.

CommonDiagnosis.title: Common Diagnosis
CommonDiagnosis.description: A predefined diagnosis for quick selection.

/records/{recordId}.description: Collection of patient medical certificate records.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of system users and their roles.

/doctors/{doctorId}.description: Collection of doctors who can sign certificates.

/commonDiagnoses/{diagnosisId}.description: Collection of common diagnoses for dropdowns.
